data.name: 回鄉後，有超可愛幽靈在我家!?
data.detailed_description:
◆遊戲故事

鄉下小屋裡有奇怪的聲音、主動打開的電視和自己移動的物品該怎麼辦？跪求高手指點！

失業的你，不得已回到城郊的老家，卻發現祖父母的遺囑中，有一塊指定給你繼承的土地，附帶一棟閒置的破舊小屋。

你懷著對城市的厭倦，心灰意冷地住下來，打算種種菜，得過且過，然而家中卻開始出現異常現象：整理好的東西被弄亂、曬乾的襪子永遠少一隻，還經常夢到身軀嬌軟的美少女騎在你身上搖晃。

本以為是太累產生的錯覺，沒想到，家裡有鬼是真的，春夢中的美少女也是真的——

想要消除她的執念，使其順利投胎，就必須完成她的願望，幫她體驗人生。帶點混亂又輕鬆搞笑的幽靈戀愛物語，在這個城郊小鎮裡，與可愛的幽靈室友過著沒羞沒臊的生活，共同寫下如煙火般燦爛的回憶。

請益：家中住著一個幽靈美少女該怎麼辦？

那當然是和她談一場人鬼殊途的戀愛啊！

data.short_description: 鄉下的破舊小屋裡，除你之外，還住著一位神秘的幽靈少女。你將與這位幽靈展開奇妙的戀愛物語，要一邊種菜打工、修理房子，還要邊滿足她的願望，直到她順利投胎為止。
data.supported_languages:
英文, 法文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 日文*, 泰文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 越南文, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later (64-Bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GT630 or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later (64-Bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GT630 or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: My Roommate is a cute Ghost Girl!?
data.detailed_description:
◆Game Story

What should I do if there are strange sounds in a rural cabin, a TV that turns on by itself, and objects that move on their own? Help, anyone?!

Unemployed, you are forced to return to your old home in the suburbs, only to find in your grandparents' will a plot of land designated for you, along with an unoccupied, dilapidated cottage.

Heartbroken and weary from city life, you move in, planning to grow vegetables and just get by.

However, abnormal phenomena begin to occur in the house: tidied items are messed up, one sock is always missing from the dried laundry, and you often dream of a beautiful girl with a tender, soft body riding on top of you.

You thought it was an illusion caused by exhaustion, but to your surprise, the ghost in the house is real, and the beautiful girl in your wet dream is also real—

To dispel her obsession and allow her to reincarnate smoothly, you must fulfill her wishes and help her experience life. A slightly chaotic, yet lighthearted and funny ghost romance story, where you live a shameless life with your cute ghost roommate in this suburban town, writing down memories as brilliant as fireworks.

Need tips ASAP! What to do with a ghost girl in my house?

Of course, have a cross-species romance with her!

data.short_description: In the dilapidated cottage in the countryside, besides you, there also lives a mysterious ghost girl. You will embark on a fantastic romance story with this ghost, farming, working part-time, and repairing the house while fulfilling her wishes until she successfully reincarnates.
data.supported_languages:
English, French, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese*, Thai, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Vietnamese, Korean
*languages with full audio support

Minimum:

  • Storage: 1 GB available space
